channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: UnitedHealthcare to Cut Prior Authorizations
item.description: UnitedHealthcare said Wednesday it will eliminate prior authorization requirements for 30% of services in a move aimed at reducing delays for patients...

item.title: Judge Unseals Purported Epstein Suicide Note
item.description: A federal judge in New York on Wednesday released a suicide note purportedly written by Jeffrey Epstein weeks before the convicted sex offender was fo...

item.title: Live Blog: Los Angeles Mayoral Debate
Louise Lucas Issues Statement After FBI Search, and What's Noteworthy Is What She Left Out
